titleStmt.title: SII 37.381: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 381. (A.R. No. B 28 of 1941-42.) Śaṅkhavaram, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying in front of the Chennakēśavasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1469, Parābhava, Chaitra, śu. 11, Monday. However, the details of the date are irregular.

It records the remission of the tax on the barbers in the villages in Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma by Nandyāla Timmarājayya. It also mentions the similar remission, made on the barbers of the empire by the order of the king at the request of Koṇḍōju, son of Timmōju.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh: Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 181.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śa
kavarṣa ṁbulu 1469 Agunēṭi parā
bhava saṁvatsara chaitra śu 11 sō śrīmanmahārājarā
jādhirājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadā
sivadēva mahārāyalu pritivi sāmrājyaṁ sēyucu
ḍaṁgānu rāmarājayyaṁgāru tuṁgabhadrā ṁdu
virupākṣaliṁgaṁ viṭhalēśvara sannidhini kaṁdena vō
tiṁmōju koḍuku koṁḍōju ṁcina maṁgaḷa
paṁnu sarvamānyaṁgānu maniṁstimani [Ā]na
yyavāru naṁdyāla tiṁmmarāju
ni ceppi mīnāyaṁkrānaku cellē ghaṁḍikō
laku cellēgrāmālanu sahāgānu maṁgali
nyaṁgā sarmastimani śāsanaṁ vēyiṁ
naṁdyāla tiṁmarājayyavāru vēIṁccina dharmaśā
sanamu . yīdharmānaku Uvvaru tappi
vāru vāraṇāśilōnu Aśva gō
cēsina pāpānaṁbōduru tamatalli
taṁḍṟlanu vāraṇāśilōnu vadhiṁccina pāpā
naṁbōvuvāru vokē talliki vokētaṁ
ḍriki janmiṁcinavāṁḍugā Ani Icci
na dharmaśāsanaṁ . svadattā dviguṇaṁ pu
ṇyaṁ paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 37.381 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
